reviews.review_description: Game is released, even though there’s nothing to do and nothing to earn it is poorly made, and the owner gets his friends and I know this because I used to be friends with them and I’m seeing them review and he only gets them to put good ratings so his app looks good. It is not good. You’re not try. Also it is very wonky with glitches. If you join a lobby with items already spawned in it, you will crash. Also like I said before there’s nothing to do, you can only look at stuff or use a nonworking camera. Also people just remove on this game just cause it’s their friend who made it. All they do is talk about the person and not the game. because no one wants to play the game with how bad it is.
i love it omgmgmg dude i have my own thing in it YAY! i know the creator, and im in love with this game<D
this game appeared in the downloaded app on the headset even though nobody in my family downloaded it but its still a cool and fun game
The owner is very, very nice and the monsters look amazing ￼

reviews.review_title: The owner of this game is amazing
reviews.review_description: The owner may be one of the nicest people in the world this game is always getting up dates and is just amazing don’t listen to anyone being negative about this game they just don’t know how to play this game is still in beta so just remember that the amount of work put in to this game is crazy I have personally watched him code and 3d model plz give this game a try
W game met the owner he’s really cool
I think this is a good game because I like it
